programs.title: The Cotswolds With Pam Ayres
programs.desc: Pam heads to North Gloucestershire and the village of Toddington. Next stop is to a potter's workshop in the village of Winchcombe, and then to Cotswold Farm Park to meet Adam Henson.

programs.title: Living Black
programs.desc: Karla Grant travels to Western Australia to meet the rappers behind 'Banksia Beats', a hip-hop therapy program that's helping young detainees at Banksia Hill and Unit 18 find their voice through rap.

programs.title: Plat Du Tour
programs.desc: Auvergne-Rhones-Alpes, is a farming region that celebrates pork in all its glory, from hams, to sausages, to the pork mince that Guillaume will use to stuff some beautiful vegetables.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Matildas legends Elise Kellond-Knight and Lydia Williams join Adam to make some dinner saves that are destined for the highlights reel.

programs.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programs.desc: Archaeologists investigate how robbers looted the pyramids and tombs of ancient Egypt, and what clues they left behind.

programs.title: Jeopardy!
programs.desc: An American television quiz show in which three contestants try to win money as they are quizzed on all types of trivia.
